request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about Observing a Chemical Change. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Physical vs. Chemical Changes. Must show visually: Magnesium Ribbon burns in air. Visual goal: A labelled classroom diagram for Observing a Chemical Change that makes the process or structure visible while the teacher explains lesson_hook.. Teaching context: Use the classic magnesium ribbon experiment to introduce observable signs of chemical reactions.. Student takeaway: Students will identify that a new substance with different properties is formed during a reaction.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout. Do not include any words, letters, labels, heading...
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
